[메인 프롬프트]  
A modern and sleek workspace featuring a computer screen displaying vibrant and clean CSS code snippets. The desk is equipped with design tools, a notepad with sketches of CSS layouts, and a cup of coffee. In the background, there are posters illustrating modern CSS techniques such as layout fixes, color transitions, and image resizing. The workspace is well-lit, emphasizing a productive and innovative environment.

[스타일]  
minimalist with a touch of digital realism

inspiring and modern, conveying a sense of creativity and efficiency
